General.Name: FAR Intl Hldg Grp Co Ltd
General.Description: FAR International Holdings Group Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides cross-border e-commerce logistics services in Mainland China, Hong Kong, the United States, Singapore, the United Kingdom, and internationally. It offers end-to-end cross-border delivery services, including parcel reception, warehousing, security clearance, packaging, labeling, and sorting services; and freight forwarding and other logistics services, such as freight forwarding, customs clearance, parcel pick-up from air/seaports, warehouse operation, and transportation and last-mile delivery services. The company also provides freight forwarding services through air, sea, and ground transportation delivery methods; and a range of value-added supply chain solutions comprising customs clearance/collection/distribution, industry, and OGP/OSP solutions. It serves e-commerce platforms, e-commerce sellers, other logistics service providers, and traditional traders. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
General.Address: Hangzhou Cross-border e-commerce Industrial Park, Hangzhou, China, 310022
